entry.title: Employee Central Benefit
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I'm trying to Configure the Medical Reimbursement Benefit in Employee Central. After Click on the start claim button I'm facing an error that "In BenefitEmployeeClaim, frequency is not the field or association name". I have also checked all the fields and associations but haven't found a solution.

Error logs found:

"com.successfactors.genericobject.api.exception.ValidationExceptionWithAdditionalDetails: [key=EMPLOYEE_HRIS_GO_INVALID_FIELD_OR_ASSOCIATION, values=[frequency, BenefitEmployeeClaim]] Messages:[key=EMPLOYEE_HRIS_GO_INVALID_FIELD_OR_ASSOCIATION, values=[frequency, BenefitEmployeeClaim]]"

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Hi , I have added characteristic values in CT04 in DEV , but when transported to qas i dont see
entry.content: What exactly you seen in CT04 in your quality system? Once you entered the characteristics, on the right side, you can see change button. When you click on it, what message do you see?

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Flexible Workflow (WS02000006)
entry.content:
Hi NND

If the system is sending a workitem to a agent (user) from SWIA you can see the pending workitem, the log of the workflow. Or from "flexible workflow administration".

Best regards

 

JCD

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Flexible Workflow (WS02000006)
entry.content:
Hi JCD,

The user is receiving the notification in My Inbox, for the order to either release,reject or rework.

In SWIA the work item is READY to be completed by the approver.

But the system (SAP_WFRT) is automatically releasing the sales order without the user taking any action and still the notification is pending in My Inbox.

entry.title: Password for abap platform trial with error in licence
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I recently installed the SAP ABAP Platform trial using Docker and itried to log in but the logon screen after entering DEVELOPER user id and password but keep getting the error in licence check error.

Could someone who has encountered a similar problem advise me if this trial version can still be run?

thank you very much for your help

entry.title: Re: Attachments on Remittance or Payment status information
entry.content:
Hello @Velu_V As far as i know, there is one feature which needs to be enabled on Ariba Network to consume attachments for Payment Remittance. If you are not using CIG or BTP then i guess you need to build the integration using middleware to post Payment Remittance cXML with attachment to AN Buyer ID/URL. 
I think this would require some POC to validate the design & solution

"cXML remittance advice documents can be sent with header-level attachments. Please contact your SAP Ariba Customer Support Specialist to enable remittance attachment"

Remittance Advice Documents | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Vendor Upload File in Ariba Network
entry.content:
Hello @Velu_V 

Main reason for Vendor Upload file (VUF) to setup Enterprise account in SAP Ariba. I guess you can refer below video which explain why and how to use Vendor Upload file.

https://support.ariba.com/item/view/188605

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit Error : instance already exists in the table
entry.content:
How can the Data Migration Cockpit be configured or utilized to perform a mass upload of material master data for multiple company codes and valuation types in a single file? Currently, attempting to combine records for multiple company codes and valuation types in one upload file leads to staging table errors indicating duplicate key fields, even when no duplicates exist within the file. Is there a way to simplify this process and avoid the need to create separate files for each combination of company code and valuation type?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Data Migration Cockpit Error : instance already exist...
entry.content: The tool was designed for initial data load specifically, not daily operation. For that, updating entries is not allowed. For objects such as "Product - extend existing record by new org levels", the field "Run ID can" be used to iterate over pre-existing entries but, even so, it has to be done on subsequent runs (please see the attached documentation). In the end, if another entry with the same key fields exist, it will be considered a duplicate and will be skipped.

entry.title: Re: Fiori app Mass change of sales orders returns error '...
entry.content:
Hi, can you check whether OSS 3389957 - Issue with Mass change sales Order not processing more than 2k orders  of any use.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Hide subform based on page count and assign particula...
entry.content:
For benefits of all.

You simply have to put your footer in the last subform of your content.

Do not place it in the master page.

So the last information printed will be the one  containing with this subform.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors "formCompetancy"api access issue? can...
entry.content:
To resolve the issue with accessing or updating data using the SuccessFactors FormCompetency API from CPI, ensure that your query adheres strictly to the specified format. The API expects the following structure:

http://<api server>/odata/v2/FormCompetency(formContentId=17617L,formDataId=7182L,itemId=7L,sectionIndex=4)?$format=json

Parameters in the URL:  The formContentId, formDataId, itemId, and sectionIndex are required fields and must be included in the query string.
These values must be formatted as <fieldName>=<value>L (note the L for each value).

Example Use Case: : https://api5.successfactors.eu/odata/v2/FormCompetency(formContentId=17617L,formDataId=7182L,itemId=7L,sectionIndex=4)?$format=json
To know more please check the link which you have provided :
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/b6c3612422194ec89bad2457f661b1e0.html#use-case-1%3A-query-the-basic-information-of-a-competency

BR
Surya

entry.title: Dimension Description Text Options
entry.content:
Hi All,

I import Dimension properties from BW for Dimension ID and Description. Example company code and hierarchies:

Dimension ID      Description           H1

1000                   Company1001      North America

North America    North America

In the Stories, I would like to have an alternate description like NA. Is there a solution how to achieved this?

The example above is just one company code, I have hundreds and different hierarchies values. Change it manually is not an option.

Thanks in advance for your idea.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4H (IDOC) to SAP CPI - Inbound IDoc Interface
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I want to thank you all in advance for helping me in my journey. 

I'm getting stuck at step number 6 of this blog. When I try to add message type in the partner profile, the receiver port is not showing the CPI port. See screenshot attached. I have created port similar to how you have shown in step 5 of this blog. I'm assuming the port created in step 5 is what should be displayed in the receiver port in WE20, correct?

I am following this blog to practice and learn how to establish connection between S4 to CPI and send any idoc from S4 to CPI

[SAP-CPI] HOW TO SEND IDOC FROM SAP ERP TO SAP CPI – SAP Zero to Hero

entry.title: Re: Build a dynamic rolling forecast with SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel

entry.title: Re: Personas 3.0 SAP GUI and Scripting - Does not work af...
entry.content:
Hi Tamas.

I will like to thank you for your recommendation.
I did update my SAP GUI Windows version to latest version and then still it didn't work so I opened a case for the SAP GUI Team.
And I will like to share that this is a known issue and the bug is caused by Microsoft and SAP is talking to Microsoft about it but until it is solved there is a workaround.

It is described in this SAP note.
3549619 - Windows 11 24H2: SAP Screen Personas scripting in SAP GUI for Windows no longer works

Best regards
Thor

entry.title: Re: How to upload an empty value to remove the existing v...
entry.content:
Hello Mircea_KYN,

Thank you for reaching out. I am not seeing any modifiers for the job description on the Job Posting Template Upload that you can do self-service to force this to be blank. Further ones reserved for other modules such as using '[Blank]' won't work here either.

If you are needing these to be truly blank, your best bet here would be to raise a case with our support team to explore if a BSR can be created and executed to remove the descriptions on the existing JPT's as this is demonstrated to not be available self-service.

Just for a full understanding, what is the need currently to remove all descriptions?

entry.title: 3PR Remittance Evaluation program PC00_M99_URME Reporting details by employees with too many rows
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We converted to S4 recently and started using the program PC00_M99_URME for Third-party remittance evaluation run.

We have concerns with this program’s reporting. It is populating nearly 20k rows for one pay period wherein the PC00_M99_URMU program used to get less than 100 rows in the report output. We see that URME report is generating the data by employee, output shows the data by employee. But we want the data by the Supplier and Business area only like we had in URMU.

Any help would be appreciated to bring the format like URMU.

URME:

URMU:

We need only one row for Supplier and Bus.A combination. But it is populating it by employee, so we see more rows.

For example, 812 Supplier and 1001 Bus.A should display the total amount in one row and 812 Supplier and 1002 Bus.A in one row like in URMU report below. Same for 810 and 1001, 1002 combination.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Error when deploying Fiori app from VS code -Unexpect...
entry.content:
do what it asked.

error abap-deploy-task ZDFGT Change logging level to debug your issue

entry.title: Re: Error when deploying Fiori app from VS code -Unexpect...
entry.content: The error '<', "<!DOCTYPE "... is not valid JSON has high probability of being an authentication issue. The ABAP system is responding with HTML, possibly for signing in to the request to deploy.

entry.title: is it possible to create sales order with reference of internal order
Re: Attachment in mobile services Can anyone guide me on...
entry.content:
From your metadata you have a three level hierarchy  Equipment > Failure > Files.

So assuming the equipment already exists you could call CreateRelatedEntity to create the failure and associate it to the equipment.  Then call CreateRelatedEntity again to create the files entity relating it to the new failure and finally call UploadStream to store the attachment in the download property of the files entity.  

From the metadata it does not look like you can attach more than one file to the failure so you don't need to worry about looping over the list of attachments.  If it is desired to attach more than one you would need to modify your backend service to support a Collection of files associated to the failure.

entry.title: Re: Process order with DLV status are not settled
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have checked these orders, these are actually settled. We have jobs which are being used to run the settlement process. So these orders were delivered on the evening of 24/11/2024 at 17:15:00 and the job for variances were ran on 23/11/2024 at 22:00:00 and after that the actual settlement job was ran on 24/11/2024 at 01:00:00. So my question is if these orders are delivered on evening of 24/11/2024 at 17:15:00 and the settlement job which was ran earlier in the mid-night of 24/11/2024 at 01:00:00 and completed in 10 mins, how this job settled the orders which are not delivered when the job was running.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Free Trials – Top 5 Picks of Students
entry.content:
As the year ends, I want to express our sincere gratitude to SAP University Alliances for the invaluable support and resources this year. Your commitment to fostering education and innovation has profoundly impacted our students and faculty.

We have greatly benefited from the free trials of SAP solutions, which have provided us with practical insights and experience. The advancements in SAP's AI services have also enriched our knowledge in this ever-evolving field.

Furthermore, the regional events organized by SAP have showcased global collaboration and offered valuable networking opportunities.

Thank you for your unwavering support in education. We look forward to continuing our partnership with SAP University Alliances in the new year. Wishing you happy holidays and a successful new year.

entry.title: Re: is it possible to create sales order with reference o...
entry.content:
Yes, it is possible to create a sales order with a reference to an internal order in SAP ERP1
Define the Reference: Ensure that the internal order is properly defined in the system
Set Up Sales Document Type: Go to transaction code VOV8 and select your sales document type In the "General Control" tab, set the "Reference mandatory" field to the appropriate reference type (e.g., internal order).
Create Sales Order: Use transaction code VA01 to create a new sales order. When prompted, enter the reference to the internal order.

entry.title: Re: reset user password through command line
entry.content:
Hi Sheshman,

In my opinion, R3trans does not support this functionality, I may be wrong.

And even if it is possible, when there are many other reliable and secure ways to achieve this, why go with R3trans? There are DB-specific tools, and SAP applications (frontend) to do what you want to do.

Regards,

Prithviraj

You are not authorized to query the remote system. Please ask your administrator to grant you the InA role.

 

Regards,

AJ

entry.title: Re: Regarding the sap systems and non-sap systems
entry.content: Hi Luka,

entry.title: SAPience user day - a breath of fresh air
entry.content:
How to simplify your work every day

SAPience represents the Belgian SAP user group. Last Tuesday 03/11/2024 they hosted the SAPience user day in  Salons De Waerboom in Dilbeek. Since one year new leadership is in place and change has been ongoing to transform the user group.

You can find more information on SAPience over on their website: https://sapience.be/

The theme of this year was "How to simplify your work every day".

There are also new, additional board members in place and all of this seems to have led to what I would call a breath of fresh air: new ideas, new initiatives and as a result new outcomes.

I was present together with SAP Partner CNT with whom Aiden partners up for a number of projects since we are often complementary. A collaboration that works very well and creates win-win situations for both parties.

The day kicked off with announcements around SAPience, followed by a short introduction into where SAP stands in terms of strategy by Stijn De Beuckelaer.

Then it was center stage for a lengthier presentation on SAP Business AI by Kai Muehlbauer. You could sense that the AI topic is hot, some of the audience was shifting more towards the tip of their chair, others were wipping out cellphones to take pictures of the slides.

A small demo near the end was in my opinion the most impressive, SAP's Joule AI premium skills used in combination with each other across SAP's product portfolio speaks to the imagination of users on what the future can look like with the help of AI assistance. It screams "this is how it should be" if you would ask me to describe what it looks like. Pretty powerful in other words. The future looks bright.

Break-out sessions by SAP Partners and customers

After the keynote you had multiple tracks of break-out sessions by SAP Partners and customers on how they have simplified their every day work using SAP technology.

Outside of networking, I've attended a number of sessions and what I found was a lot of willingness to share knowledge, a lot of enthusiasm and a large community spirit. Basically what I would expect from a SAP user group where you would find a lot of individuals who really love being active in this space. It was in contrast with my experience of a number of years ago.

Networking opportunities

The enthusiasm from within the sessions also translated into a lot of conversations and networking outside of the sessions. The event was well organized, the venue was accommodating and there was ample room for networking in terms of time divided between sessions and breaks.

Opportunity to grow and call for action

I had the pleasure of meeting a lot of friends there from within the Belgian SAP community. You could state the usual suspects were present but still I was missing some key persons so that's a call for action really.

From what I've seen at the event, there is much more that can happen still in the future given the user group keeps on growing. I've already expressed my interest to get involved in terms of giving knowledge sessions and presentations in the future and being active in the Belgian user group.

You can see the new branding already in the header of this blog and it represents (for me) the breath of fresh air that is now installed in SAPience so a call out to SAP Partners and customers in Belgium: reach out to the SAPience user group if you're not yet a member and consider becoming a member because you can find added value here and strength does also come in numbers in terms of sharing knowledge to each other and discussing amongst peers on best practices and more when it comes to SAP.

entry.title: Re: Process order with DLV status are not settled
entry.content: The settlement job can settle orders that were delivered after the job started but before it finished. This is because the system processes transactions in real-time and updates continuously. So, even if the settlement job started at 01:00:00, it would still include orders delivered up until 17:15:00, as long as the job was still running.

entry.title: Re: Hi , I have added characteristic values in CT04 in DE...
entry.content:
The values in CT04 typically follows specific system restrictions since many tasks are handled differently compared to on-premise systems. 

  • Characteristic values entered in CT04 in DEV were not transported to the quality system. 
  • In the quality system, CT04 is non-editable, meaning you cannot add the values directly. This behavior is expected in systems where the configuration is locked to ensure consistency between DEV and QAS.
  • When you navigate to CT04 in the quality system, click the Change button on the right side. Depending on your system setup, you may see one of the following:
    • A message like "Client is not modifiable": Indicates that the quality system is locked for direct configuration changes.
    • Authorization Errors: If you do not have appropriate roles or permissions to modify CT04 entries.
    • No response or greyed-out fields: Signifying that the system restricts this action entirely.

Options to Add PGrp (Purchasing Group) to Characteristic Values:

Option 1: Adjust DEV and Re-Transport

  • Go back to DEV and add the new Purchasing Group (PGrp) to the characteristic values in CT04.
  • Verify that the characteristic changes are included in a transport request and re-transport them to quality.
  • Ensure that the transport includes all relevant dependency objects if applicable.

Option 2: Use Manual Workarounds

  • If transport is not possible or you need an immediate solution, request the system administrator or key user to unlock the quality client temporarily for configuration changes.
  • Once unlocked, you can manually add the PGrp values to CT04 in the quality system.

Option 3: Leverage Master Data Management Tools

  • Use a master data maintenance transaction like CL24N (Assign Object to Class) if applicable.
  • Depending on your setup, tools like MDG (Master Data Governance) can sometimes support data replication or enrichment for characteristics across environments.

entry.title: Re: reset user password through command line
entry.content: In our system more than 400 users and most of them are keep forgetting or locking their users, half of my day spending to onluck or reset their passwords, i thought that if i can prepare an automation it'll be much more easier to reset their password by sending their username to that automation instead of goto solman and su01 reset & unlock 🙂 Can you suggest some of that other ways so i can work on?

entry.title: Re: Creation of a Work Permit Using Create Work Permit Request App (App Id: F4691)

Is there a way to maintain isolations needed and perform tagging as in classical wcm functionality

entry.title: Re: Quality notification and Internal order link
entry.content:
Dear Alex,

thank you for the details provided. 

I recommend to check whether the internal order is created with a custom function or standard in the action box/follow-up function.

A lot of object types - not each though - created from the quality notification are added to the document flow of the notification in standard. There is a 'Document Flow' button in the QM02/QM03 transaction to check those.

If you have a custom function creating the order, you might consider implementing a feature, which adds the relation between the order and notification to the document flow. It worth to search in this topic a little, whether it can fit your business needs.

I wish you a nice day,
Albert
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: QS61 how it works
entry.content:
Dear ps0410,

thank you for the details provided.

Transaction QS61 covers the material specification. I recommend to start your journey at SAP Help:

'Material Specification'
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/5555bd53d34ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

Then you will have a better overview how and what is it used for.

I wish you a nice day,
Albert

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello! That's amazing Thank you

entry.title: [Q] How to change the hostname used for Fiori Launchpad ? (/n/ui2/flp)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

after doing a system copy of an S/4 Hana system, when starting the Fiori Launchpad using transaction /n/ui2/flp, it is opening the URL with the hostname of the old system. How do we change it to the new hostname ?

I only found a suggestion to edit table httpurlloc, but there is no hostname there and we are not using web dispatcher on this system.

Many thanks for letting me know quickly!

entry.title: MD04 date calculation
entry.content:
Hello All,

we have sales scheduling agreements created with delivery date as week 02.2025(that is January 6th(Monday). As January 6th is holiday, in MD04 system propose the delivery date as previous working date which is January 3rd. Business requirement is, in MD04 system should propose the next day that is January 7th. not previous day.

If requested delivery date is holiday, system should propose next working day. not previous working day in MD04. Please advise to fix this requirement.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Mass - Sales Scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Hello All, 

we have more than 200 sales scheduling agreements required to change delivery schedule number for all scheduling agreements. 

Please advise how to change delivery schedule number for all more than 200 scheduling agreements at a time? in MASS transaction, there is no object for sales scheduling agreement.

Thanks & Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAPUI5 with React and UI5 Web Components: Simple Note App
entry.content:
@chrisobar Thanks this is quite good.
how about the other way around.
Say i have a bunch of components made from react using what not libraries out there, then is there a recommended way by which you can consume them in the UI5 applications?
for e.g.: what if we extract such react components as a WebComponent and then consume them just how it is recommended to get consumed in any website. Drop in the build js file and then use the component.

is there a recommendation for this?

entry.title: Document attachment provision in SAP S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In SAP S4 HANA public cloud, there is option of 'Attachment' to attach the document while creating Purchase Requisition, Purchase order and invoice verification. My question is whether it included in DMS or it is Add on provision provided by SAP, if it is add on provision then what is the total storage limitation? How can I extend it if necessary.

Regards,

Yogita Kadam

entry.title: Re: Can we integrate of React framework into SAP UI5 fram...
entry.content:
How about extracting the react component as a WebComponent. Then consume it in the UI5 application by dropping the js file and the consuming as if it is a regular HTML tag?

@mariusobert @RaviKant_Ranjan

entry.title: SAP Payroll - Wage Type Reporter for both Pre-payroll and Payroll processes customization?
entry.content:
In our SAP environment, payroll processing is managed through PCC (Payroll Calculation Control) with three distinct processes: Pre-payroll, Payroll, and Post-Payroll.

During both Pre-payroll and Payroll processes, the programs RPCALCF0 and H99CWTR0 (or a custom version ZXXX_H99_N) are executed. However, RPCALCF0 runs in test mode during Pre-payroll and real mode during Payroll. We've noticed that when RPCALCF0 is in test mode, it doesn't generate a cluster, which causes the custom program ZXXX_H99_N to fail in reading updated information.

Conversely, the standard program H99CWTR0 seems to function correctly even in test mode (Not 100% sure). How does H99CWTR0 manage to work in test mode, and how can we modify our custom program to behave similarly? Please need help. Thank you so much. 

HCM Payroll HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: Re: Knowledge Graphs - Datasphere vs HANA Cloud
entry.content: It's planned for Q1 2025

entry.title: Re: Special changes option in qa02
entry.content:
Dear Raghavan Kathamuthu,

thank you for the details provided.

I recommend to read this newly created KBA in the topic:

3549886 - Menu option missing or greyed out in transaction QA02 or QA11 when called from an other transaction - like QA32

I wish you a nice day,
Albert
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hello,

how to automatically trigger price update after some important fields have been changed by user in sales order?

For example, our prices depend on plant. Assume user changes plant on sales order item - the price should be redetermined automatically, but its not happening.

entry.content:
Hello,

how to automatically trigger price update after some important fields have been changed by user in sales order?

For example, our prices depend on plant. Assume user changes plant on sales order item - the price should be redetermined automatically, but its not happening.

entry.title: Re: Table refresh after bound RAP action execution on mul...
entry.content:
were you able to accomplish this.

I have a similar issue, refresh the list items after one of the item is cancelled ( a custom action) and the item should not longer appear in list. now i have to use go button after custom action to see the result.

i wanted the list to be refreshed automatically after custom action.

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP Wage Type Mapping
entry.content:
How salaries are calculated in SAP depends on the Master Data configuration of the employee (PA), on the configuration of the Payroll Period configuration, on the Country, on the WageType's configuration relating to some Processing Classes, Cumulators, etc...

Try using t-code PC00_M99_DLGA20 to get an overview of the configuration in table T512W (use your Country Code, don't select any WT, and use today's date only), then drill down into the report.Using table views, you could also look at V_512W_D or V_512W_B, or even V_512W_O.

Then you will have to look at the Payroll Schema that is being used.  If it is the Country's original, look for Custom Personal Calculation Rules that would have been added to it.  If it is a Custom copy of the Country's schema, look for Custom Sub-schema and Personal Calculation Rules that would have been added or substituted (from the original).

Note that SAP-Press used to sell a book on the subject.

entry.title: Re: Calling Word long text editor SAP GUI: "Document interface not initialized" (SOFFICEIN
entry.content: YES!! SAVED MY LIFE.

entry.title: SAP API Management - Set Basic Authentication for API Proxy in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Dear All,

In SAP Integration Suite, Basic Authentication offers a simple way to safeguard your API proxies using a username and password. This blog covers how to configure Basic Authentication for your API proxy in API Management.

Follow the Below Steps to Set Basic Authentication to your API Proxy.

Step 1 : Create a Proxy with your target endpoint (For test purpose i used httpbin URL)

https://httpbin.org/get

 

 



Step 2 : Go to Policies and Assign Basic Authentication in PreFlow Incoming request Stream

 

 Provide the below code in the policy editor:

 

<BasicAuthentication async='true' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<Operation>Decode</Operation>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
	<User ref='current.username'></User>
	<Password ref='current.password'></Password>
	<Source>request.header.Authorization</Source>
</BasicAuthentication>

 

 

Step 3 : Add Raise Fault Policy in PreFlow Incoming Stream (Next to the Basic Authentication Policy)

 

 

<RaiseFault async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <FaultResponse>
        <Set>
            <Headers/>
            <Payload contentType="application/json">{"status" : "Error", "messege" : "401 Unauthorized" } </Payload>
            <StatusCode>401</StatusCode>
            <ReasonPhrase>Unauthorized</ReasonPhrase>
        </Set>
    </FaultResponse>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
</RaiseFault>

 

In RaiseFault Policy ConditionString Provide below Code (Replace "YOUR_USERNAME" & "YOUR_PASSWORD" with your credentials)

 

(current.username != "YOUR_USERNAME")  OR (current.password != "YOUR_PASSWORD")

 

Save and Deploy.

Testing : 

To Test the Basic Authentication Try a GET Call for Your API Proxy in PostMan:

Positive Testing : 

Provide the exact Username and Password given in the Condition String :


Negative Testing : 

Provide an incorrect username and password to verify if access is correctly denied.

Incorrect Username :

Incorrect Password :

Thank You!

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Regarding the Secure Act 2.0 "Super" Catch up:

We have loaded service pack 139 (D9) which was released on Thursday 5 Dec 2024.

First of all, the extra Catch up was given to anyone born between 01 Jan 1962 and 31 Dec 1965. I believe this complies with the IRS language"applies for individuals who attain age 60, 61, 62, or 63 in 2025 ". This was not working previously but looks good now.

The maximum amount for anyone in this age group for 2025 is $34,750 (31,000 for anyone 50+ AND 3,750 Super catch up).  The maximum amount for 2024 was $30,500 for anyone 50+.

The issue we have is with the wage types that are getting populated.  In 2024, the total amount of 30,500 all went to the same wage type (configured in V_5UBA_WT).  In 2025, 23,500 went to this wage type, and 11,250 went to the new "Super Catch up" wage type (configured in V_T7USBEN03). However, only 3,750 should be considered the Super Catch Up portion, and the remaining 7,500 is the regular catch up that is available to anyone 50+.

We plan to create a PCR to split the Super Catch up Wage type into 2 components: The first 7500 will be moved to a different WT, and any amount that is greater than 7500 will remain in the Super catch up WT.

entry.title: Access request Path status is showing unknown
entry.content: in GRC Access request, path status is showing as unknown and not routing to stage

entry.title: How to reverse the blocked stock posted while giving UD
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One of our user is made the stock posting to blocked (mvt 350) while giving the UD. After that he wanted to reverse the GR. As per SAP note '3252610', we cannot cancel the GR as the inspection lot has already posted. We also don't want to use the SAP note '33924' and '175842', so we have suggested user to scrap the stock with the help of 555 mvt but this has made the cost debit on different GL account. So can you pls suggest me how we can adjust this cost on this GL account, or suggest a way so that we can remove the stock from system without having any financial impact.

Any help will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Process order with DLV status are not settled
entry.content: Hi @Saif_Ali_Sabri the settlement job was not running more than 10 min, it got finished at 01:10:00, still it has settled the orders which were delivered at 17:15:00.

entry.title: DATUB field for BOM components Valid to date
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I wanted to know the tables for DATUB field for the valid to date of BOM components but I checked the several SAP community post and found that there is no table which can provide the DATUB field. We are using the ECN to update the BOM. So when we update the BOM we overwrite it on existing BOM means if we have created BOM ALT 1 with 3 components with valid to date 31.12.9999 and after some time we wanted to update the BOM with only one component then instead of creating BOM ALT 2 we update the existing ALT 1 BOM with ECN, so it deletes the existing components and updates the new one. So suppose we updated the ALT BOM 1 valid from 01.12.2024 then it will update the valid to as 01.12.2024 for existing 3 components and 31.12.9999 for new updated BOM component. My question here is if the existing 3 components gets updated with valid to date as 01.12.2024 then why the STPO table still shows it as 31.12.9999; why it's not updated with 01.12.2024? Is the Valid_To field on STPO is not linked with DATUB field?

Any help will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Become an Expert Peer for SAP Support Programs!

entry.title: Re: Need help with creating BADI implementation programmatically in ABAP
entry.content: What would be the purpose of creating a BADI dynamically?

entry.title: Re: sap/ui/export/Spreadsheet.js 404 not found
entry.content:
Hi, to include sap.ui.export in your project, you need to update your ui5.yaml file. Add the library as shown below:

framework:

  name: SAPUI5

  version: "1.108.0"

  libraries:

    - name: sap.m

    - name: sap.f

    - name: sap.uxap

    - name: sap.ui.core

    - name: sap.ui.table

    - name: themelib_sap_fiori_3

    - name: themelib_sap_horizon

    - name: sap.ui.export

After making this change, restart your project by running:

npm start

This is necessary because any changes made to ui5.yaml require the project to be restarted to take effect.

you can add the library directly in ui5.yaml or using the terminal:

ui5 add sap.ui.export

entry.title: Did you get the answer? I have the same question
entry.content: What is the link of Survey to be entered in the feedback emai

entry.title: Re: sap.ui.export missing in SAP UI5 version 1.52
entry.content:
Hi, to include sap.ui.export in your project, you need to update your ui5.yaml file. Add the library as shown below:

framework:

  name: SAPUI5

  version: "1.108.0"

  libraries:

    - name: sap.m

    - name: sap.f

    - name: sap.uxap

    - name: sap.ui.core

    - name: sap.ui.table

    - name: themelib_sap_fiori_3

    - name: themelib_sap_horizon

    - name: sap.ui.export

After making this change, restart your project by running:

npm start

This is necessary because any changes made to ui5.yaml require the project to be restarted to take effect.

you can add the library directly in ui5.yaml or using the terminal:

ui5 add sap.ui.export

entry.title: Re: How to Debug a FIORI App and the Debug Triggers in SAP Backend?
entry.content: Very clear, thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Handling SELECT OPTIONS in CDS using Table Function
entry.content:
this blogpost has helped me out very well! thank you so much!
-> ABAP Cheat Sheet in Github about AMDP is also very helpful! : https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-cheat-sheets/blob/main/12_AMDP.md

In my case I had to convert a pretty huge select inside of an old programm which is used as an extractor report with 16 left outer joins into amdp as it was slowing down the report speed. 

I used only get_data method and had to apply the filter method apply_filter inside get_data which was a kinda confusing in my case as it was giving some strange error. Here is how I solved (just in case anybody would need) :

  • select fields and assign to it_result
  • do apply_filter method and assign to it_result_filtered
  • RETURN :it_result_filtered;
METHOD get_data BY DATABASE FUNCTION
                  FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
                  OPTIONS READ-ONLY
                  USING mara marc mvke mbew
                        t320 mlgn makt mard
                        crvm_b crfh mapr prop
                        t405 t001w t006a.

    --init mandt variable
    declare lv_CLNT "$ABAP.type( MANDT )" := session_context('CLIENT');
    --init spras variable
    declare lv_langu "$ABAP.type( SPRAS )" := session_context('LANGUAGE');

    it_result = SELECT
**           MARA
           a.mandt AS client,
           a.matnr,
           a.pstat,
           a.lvorm,
           a.mtart,
           a.mbrsh,
           a.matkl,
           a.bismt,
           a.meins,
           a.bstme,
           a.groes,
           a.wrkst,
           a.normt,
           a.ekwsl,
           a.brgew,
           a.ntgew,
           a.gewei,
           a.volum,
           a.voleh,
           a.behvo,
           a.raube,
           a.tempb,
           a.tragr,
           a.stoff,
           a.spart,
           a.wesch,
           a.etiar,
           a.etifo,
           a.ean11,
           a.numtp,
           a.prdha,
           a.qmpur,
           a.vabme,
           a.kzkfg,
           a.xchpf,
           a.vhart,
           a.magrv,
           a.extwg,
           a.satnr,
           a.mstae,
           a.mstav,
           a.mstde,
           a.rbnrm,
           a.mhdrz,
           b.lzeih,
           a.mhdhb,
           a.mhdlp,
           a.nrfhg,
           a.xgchp,
           a.iprkz,
           a.rdmhd,
           a.mtpos_mara,
           a.sled_bbd,
           a.rmatp,
           a.msbookpartno,
**           MARC
           b.werks,
           b.pstat                AS pstat_c,
           b.lvorm                AS lvorm_c,
           b.mmsta,
           b.mmstd,
           b.maabc,
           b.ekgrp,
           b.ausme,
           b.dismm,
           b.dispo,
           b.plifz,
           b.webaz,
           b.perkz,
           b.perkz               AS perkz_c,
           b.ausss,
           b.disls,
           b.beskz,
           b.sobsl,
           b.minbe,
           b.eisbe,
           b.bstmi,
           b.bstma,
           b.bstfe,
           b.bstrf,
           b.mabst,
           b.sbdkz,
           b.kzaus,
           b.ausdt,
           b.nfmat,
           b.kzbed,
           b.miskz,
           b.fhori,
           b.rgekz,
           b.fevor,
           b.bearz,
           b.ruezt,
           b.tranz,
           b.basmg,
           b.dzeit,
           b.ueeto,
           b.ueetk,
           b.uneto,
           b.wzeit,
           b.insmk,
           b.insmk                AS insmk_c,
           b.ladgr,
           b.xchpf                AS xchpf_c,
           b.usequ,
           b.lgrad,
           b.auftl,
           b.mtvfp,
           b.periv,
           b.periv                AS periv_c,
           b.kautb,
           b.kautb                AS kautb_c,
           b.kordb,
           b.herkl,
           b.herkr,
           b.mtver,
           b.prctr,
           b.mrppp,
           b.fxhor,
           b.vrmod,
           b.vint1,
           b.vint2,
           b.stlal,
           b.stlan,
           b.plnnr,
           b.aplal,
           b.losgr,
           b.sobsk,
           b.frtme,
           b.lgpro,
           b.disgr,
           b.kausf,
           b.qmatv,
           b.rwpro,
           b.awsls,
           b.stdpd,
           b.xmcng,
           b.lfrhy,
           b.rdprf                AS rdprf_c,
           b.kzkup,
           b.strgr,
           b.lgfsb,
           b.eprio,
           b.qmata,
           b.plnty,
           b.sfcpf,
           b.shflg,
           b.shzet,
           b.kzech,
           b.megru,
           b.mfrgr,
           b.loggr,
           b.fprfm,
           b.casnr,
           b.gpnum,
           b.steuc,
           b.matgr,
           b.vspvb,
           b.shpro,
           b.ahdis,
           b.eislo,
           b.ncost,
           b.ppskz,
           b.scm_grprt,
           b.scm_giprt,
           b.scm_scost,
           b.scm_reldt,
           b.scm_rrp_type,
           b.scm_heur_id,
           b.scm_package_id,
           b.scm_sspen,
           b.scm_get_alerts,
           b.scm_res_net_name,
           b.scm_conhap,
           b.scm_conhap_out,
           b.scm_shelf_life_loc,
           b.scm_shelf_life_dur,
           b.scm_maturity_dur,
           b.scm_shlf_lfe_req_min,
           b.scm_shlf_lfe_req_max,
           b.scm_lsuom,
           b.scm_reord_dur,
           b.scm_target_dur,
           b.scm_tstrid,
           b.scm_stra1,
           b.scm_peg_past_alert,
           b.scm_peg_future_alert,
           b.scm_peg_strategy,
           b.scm_peg_wo_alert_fst,
           b.scm_fixpeg_prod_set,
           b.scm_whatbom,
           b.diber,
           b.altsl,
           b.vrbmt,
           b.vrbwk,
           b.vrbdt,
           b.kzkfk,
           b.autru,
**           MVKE
           c.vkorg,
           c.vtweg,
           c.lvorm                AS lvorm_e,
           c.versg,
           c.bonus,
           c.provg,
           c.sktof,
           c.vmstd,
           c.aumng,
           c.lfmng,
           c.scmng,
           c.schme,
           c.vrkme,
           c.mtpos,
           c.dwerk,
           c.prodh,
           c.pmatn,
           c.kondm,
           c.ktgrm,
           c.prat1,
           c.prat2,
           c.prat3,
           c.prat4,
           c.prat5,
           c.prat6,
           c.prat7,
           c.prat8,
           c.prat9,
           c.prata,
           c.rdprf,
**           MBEW
           d.bwkey,
           d.bwtar,
           d.lvorm                AS lvorm_w,
           d.salk3,
           d.vprsv,
           d.verpr,
           d.stprs,
           d.peinh,
           d.bklas,
           d.salkv,
           d.lfgja,
           d.lfmon,
           d.bwtty,
           d.stprv,
           d.laepr,
           d.zkprs,
           d.zkdat,
           d.zplp1,
           d.zpld1,
           d.kaln1,
           d.bwva1,
           d.vers1,
           d.hrkft,
           d.ekalr,
           d.mlmaa,
           d.mlast,
           d.hkmat,
           d.eklas,
           d.xbewm,
           d.kosgr,
**           MLGN
           e.lgnum,
           e.lvorm                AS lvorm_n,
           e.lgbkz,
           e.ltkze,
           e.ltkza,
           e.lhmg1,
           e.lhme1,
           e.lety1,
           e.lvsme,
           e.block,
           e.kzmbf,
           e.bsskz,
           e.mkapv,
           e.bezme,
           e.plkpt,
           e.vomem,
           e.l2skr,
**           MAKT
           f.spras,
           f.maktx,
**           MARD
           g.lgort,
           g.pstat                AS pstat_d,
           g.lvorm                AS lvorm_d,
           g.lwmkb,
           g.diskz,
           g.lsobs,
           g.lminb,
           g.lbstf,
           g.lgpbe,
**           CRVM_B
           h.objty,
           h.objid,
**           CRFH
           i.fgru1,
           i.fgru2,
           i.planv,
           i.bzoffb,
           i.bzoffe,
           i.steuf,
           i.ktsch,
           i.mgform,
           i.ewform,
**           MAPR
           j.pnum1,
**           T405
           k.uebtk,
           k.kzabs,
**           PROP
           l.prmod,
**           T001W
           m.land1,
**           T006A
           n.mseh3,
**           T320
           o.lgnum                AS lgnum_3
      FROM mara AS a
             LEFT OUTER JOIN
               marc AS b ON a.matnr = b.matnr
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                   mvke AS c ON a.matnr = c.matnr
                     LEFT OUTER JOIN
                       mbew AS d ON b.matnr = d.matnr AND b.werks = d.bwkey
                         LEFT OUTER JOIN
                           t320 AS o ON b.werks = o.werks
                             LEFT OUTER JOIN
                               mlgn AS e ON a.matnr = e.matnr AND o.lgnum = e.lgnum
                                 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                   makt AS f ON a.matnr = f.matnr AND f.spras = lv_langu
                                     LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                       mard AS g ON a.matnr = g.matnr AND b.werks = g.werks
                                         LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                           crvm_b AS h ON b.matnr = h.matnr AND b.werks = h.werks
                                             LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                               crfh AS i ON h.objty = i.objty AND h.objid = i.objid
                                                 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                   mapr AS j ON b.werks = j.werks AND b.matnr = j.matnr
                                                     LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                       prop AS l ON j.pnum1 = l.pnum1 AND l.hsnum = '00' AND l.versp = '00'
                                                         LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                           t405 AS k ON a.ekwsl = k.ekwsl
                                                             LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                               t001w AS m ON b.werks = m.werks
                                                                 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                                   t006a AS n ON n.spras = :lv_langu AND a.bstme = n.msehi

      WHERE a.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND b.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND c.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND d.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND o.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND e.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND f.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND g.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND h.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND i.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND j.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND l.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND k.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND m.mandt = lv_clnt
        AND n.mandt = lv_clnt
      ORDER BY a.matnr,
               b.werks;

      it_result_filtered = APPLY_FILTER( :it_result, :iv_where_amdp );

      RETURN :it_result_filtered;
  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: SAP Community Vancouver, BC, Canada - Go Live Event - All Welcome
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

You are invited to our very first pilot SAP Community Meetup in Vancouver! (BC, Canada)

  • Date: Friday, 31st of January, 2025
  • Time: 17:45 (tentative)
  • Location: Online Event URL will be shared later

We will have two short presentations, see agenda below

Agenda:

  • 17:45: Networking: Casual chit-chat and mingling.
  • 18:15: Opening Explanation of SAP Community Meetup's purpose and plan.
  • 18:50: Presentation : Introduction to SAP 
  • 19:00: Networking: Casual chit-chat and mingling.
  • 19:30: Session End

Join us for an evening of stimulating conversations and expanding your SAP network. Bring your ideas, questions, and virtual business cards

entry.title: Re: Need help with BADI implementation programmatically in ABAP
entry.content: you'd better state your requirement/scenario instead of your design/imgination
